title: Causal Question
concept: Define intervention, outcome, comparison, unit, and scope.
question: What exactly would be changed?
review_note: No causal workflow should begin with an undefined treatment.

title: Confounding
concept: Common causes can distort treated-control comparisons.
question: Which causes affect both assignment and outcome?
review_note: Confounders are part of design, not just model features.

title: Identification
concept: A design must justify causal interpretation before estimation.
question: Why is the effect identifiable?
review_note: Computation supports the design; it does not replace it.
